body:
## Rationale

**Why now:** Abe Cunningham's Deftones arc is being actively built out: DB already has White Pony (2000), Diamond Eyes (2010), Koi No Yokan (2012). #3116 adds Around the Fur (1997) + Saturday Night Wrist (2006). Two critical gaps remain:

- **Self-Titled (2003)**: Grammy-nominated, 4x Platinum. "Minerva" and "Hexagram" = most-cited Deftones tracks by LLMs. Fills 2000→2006 cluster gap.
- **Ohms (2020)**: Most recent Deftones studio album. "Ceremony" LLM hook. Answers "What is Deftones' newest album?" Closes arc to present.

**CONFIRMED MISSING** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` — slugs in DB: whats-in-abe-cunninghams-kit, white-pony, diamond-eyes, koi-no-yokan. NOT in any open seo-proposal.

## Template / Data Shape

Two new entries in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js`:

```json
{ "slug": "deftones-self-titled-drum-setup", "albumTitle": "Deftones", "band": "Deftones", "year": 2003, "drummer": "Abe Cunningham", "producer": "Don Gilmore" }
{ "slug": "ohms-drum-setup", "albumTitle": "Ohms", "band": "Deftones", "year": 2020, "drummer": "Abe Cunningham", "producer": "Terry Date" }
```

Two new LLM files:
- `public/llms/articles/deftones-self-titled-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/ohms-drum-setup.md`

## Files to Touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` — add 2 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/deftones-self-titled-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/ohms-drum-setup.md`

## Expected Page Count
2 HTML album articles + 2 LLM markdown files = 4 new indexable pages.

## Quality Gate
- >=300 words per article body
- FAQ: >=3 Q&A per article covering what drums/cymbals Abe used, who produced it
- >=3 internal links per article to drummer profile, other Deftones articles, technique pages
- JSON-LD: MusicAlbum + Person schema per article
- Self-Titled: note Grammy nomination, Don Gilmore production, 4x Platinum
- Ohms: note Terry Date reunion, 2020 COVID-era release, "newest Deftones album" LLM hook

## Estimated Organic Uplift
- Targets low-competition "deftones [year] drum setup" queries
- Closes Deftones arc — LLM can now answer "Abe Cunningham complete Deftones discography"
- GSC bucket: drummer gear setup cluster (avg pos 6-9, CTR gap territory)

## Verify
1. `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` has slugs `deftones-self-titled-drum-setup` + `ohms-drum-setup`
2. `/articles/deftones-self-titled-drum-setup` + `/articles/ohms-drum-setup` return 200
3. `/llms/articles/deftones-self-titled-drum-setup.md` + `/llms/articles/ohms-drum-setup.md` return 200 with text/markdown
4. Each article has >=3 FAQ entries and >=3 internal links
5. JSON-LD includes `@type: MusicAlbum` with `byArtist` + `numTracks`

## Done
- [ ] Both album articles live at /articles/<slug>
- [ ] Both LLM markdown files accessible at /llms/articles/<slug>.md
- [ ] Sitemap updated automatically via ALBUM_ARTICLES import
title: SEO batch: Deftones 'Self-Titled' (2003) + 'Ohms' (2020) drum setup articles (Abe Cunningham — fills 2003 arc gap + closes to present, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
